title: How many Failed Prototype Evas were there
display_title: How many Failed Prototype Evas were there
wikitext:
[]: How many Failed Prototype Evas were there?             Quote Post by V » Wed Jan 30, 2008 9:33 am How many failed Eva Prototypes were there? Yes I realize the Eva Graveyard sequence was redone for DC (Personally I think the original one looked cooler anyway), and we saw them again in EoE. So just how many can we see in an on-screen count? Or are they numbered? ***I just use the phrase "there were several dozen failed prototypes" or "there were dozens".

[]:             Quote Post by Morzella » Wed Jan 30, 2008 7:51 pm There were hundreds of the things. The main problem was that Gendo was being pressured by Seele's budget department to show what he was doing. Obviously all he was really doing was chatting up women. So to appear as if he hadn't been sitting on his hands all that time and thus get a big wedge of budget pie he sat up all one night makeing "prototype Evas" out of toilet rolls and sellotape.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jan 30, 2008 9:01 pm That wasn't a very helpful post, Morzella. Are all the prototype Evas on-screen at once? I think a lot of them are offscreen as well, and since its a jumbled mix of bones in the DC, there's no way of knowing how many were made. It's a trivial detail, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 30, 2008 9:09 pm The genga for the original OA version has been on the old commentary site for quite some time (you get to find it yourself, since I'm at a computer I hate right now), and the skeletons are numbered. Not that it really provides any definitive answer, either. Also, for the future, these sorts of things don't belong in Chit-Chat.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 30, 2008 9:56 pm You can also see at least 8 heads in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Jan 30, 2008 10:13 pm Reichu wrote: The genga for the original OA version has been on the old commentary site for quite some time (you get to find it yourself, since I'm at a computer I hate right now), and the skeletons are numbered. Not that it really provides any definitive answer, either. Also, for the future, these sorts of things don't belong in Chit-Chat.

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Thu Jan 31, 2008 4:06 am I know this doesn't help count-wise, but it's on the same topic.. Since they reworked the scene for the DC, did they not bother to change the dialogue? Because I remember Shinji asking about the failed prototypes, but every time I heard the line (in the dub) it always came across like he was talking about just one of the prototypes, and it didn't seem like it matched up to Shinji looking at a big pit full of old bones and spines and skulls. I wish I had time to pause the scenes and count the heads. I imagine there's a lot more than forty-seven offscreen as well, since it seemed to stretch a little ways.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 31, 2008 6:39 am AsukaChan wrote: Since they reworked the scene for the DC, did they not bother to change the dialogue? Because I remember Shinji asking about the failed prototypes, but every time I heard the line (in the dub) it always came across like he was talking about just one of the prototypes, and it didn't seem like it matched up to Shinji looking at a big pit full of old bones and spines and skulls.
